ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the passenger is enrolled in */,
  "frequent_flyer_number" TEXT /* Frequent flyer number of the passenger */,
  "travel_document_type" TEXT /* Type of travel document (e.g., passport, visa) */,
  "travel_document_number" TEXT /* Number of the travel document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number (e.g., AA123) */,
  "departure" TEXT /* Departure location */,
  "arrival" TEXT /* Arrival location */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Scheduled flight duration */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft assigned to the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boardings" (
  "boarding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boarding event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight associated with this boarding */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger boarding the flight */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time at which the passenger boarded */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the passenger */,
  "boarding_group" TEXT /* Boarding group (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boarding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boardings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seats" (
  "seat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight to which the seat belongs */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number (e.g., 6A) */,
  "is_window" INTEGER /* Indicates if the seat is a window seat */,
  "is_aisle" INTEGER /* Indicates if the seat is an aisle seat */,
  "seat_type" TEXT /* Type of seat (e.g., economy, business, first class) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "boarding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boarding event this status pertains to */,
  "is_seated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is seated */,
  "has_stowed_luggage" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger has stowed luggage */,
  "walking_speed" REAL /* Measured walking speed of the passenger in m/s */,
  "time_to_seat" TEXT /* Time taken for the passenger to reach their seat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_status_boarding_id FOREIGN KEY ("boarding_id") REFERENCES boardings ("boarding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "luggage" (
  "luggage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each luggage item */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger associated with the luggage */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the luggage in kg */,
  "is_stowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the luggage is stowed */,
  "luggage_type" TEXT /* Type of luggage (e.g., carry-on, checked) */,
  "luggage_location" TEXT /* Location of the luggage (e.g., overhead bin, cargo hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("luggage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_luggage_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boarding_calls" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boarding call */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight for which this call was made */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time when the boarding call was made */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the boarding call */,
  "boarding_group" TEXT /* Boarding group being called (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boarding_calls_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., crew, admin) */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Staff ID of the user (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boarding_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight for which statistics are recorded */,
  "average_boarding_time" REAL /* Average time taken for boarding in minutes */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on the flight */,
  "boarding_efficiency" REAL /* Calculated boarding efficiency as a percentage */,
  "average_time_to_seat" TEXT /* Average time taken for passengers to reach their seats */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boarding_statistics_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boarding_passes" (
  "pass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boarding pass */,
  "boarding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boarding event associated with this pass */,
  "boarding_gate" TEXT /* Gate information where the boarding occurs */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time of boarding as indicated on the pass */,
  "qr_code" TEXT /* QR code for the boarding pass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boarding_passes_boarding_id FOREIGN KEY ("boarding_id") REFERENCES boardings ("boarding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_seating" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the seat mapping */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight for which this mapping is made */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger assigned to the seat */,
  "seat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seat assigned to the passenger */,
  "seat_assignment_time" TEXT /* Time when the seat was assigned to the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_seating_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_seating_seat_id FOREIGN KEY ("seat_id") REFERENCES seats ("seat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_seating_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircrafts" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft (e.g., Boeing 737) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  "airline" TEXT /* Airline operating the aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., pilot, flight attendant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)
